description_long: This lantern object consists of a group of six distinct lanterns, each with a vertical, rectangular body and a slightly domed or peaked top. The lanterns vary in height and width, suggesting a set designed for decorative or functional use in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or plazas. Each lantern features transparent or translucent panels, likely made of glass, framed by metallic or painted metal supports. The tops of the lanterns are capped, possibly to protect the light source from weather, and the bases are flat, suitable for mounting on posts or pedestals. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation. The lanterns are arranged in a linear fashion, indicating they may be part of a coordinated lighting system.
description: A set of six modern, rectangular lanterns with glass panels and metal frames, varying in size and designed for urban outdoor use.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six lanterns aligned horizontally, highlighting their varying heights and uniform rectangular shapes.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the depth of each lantern and their linear arrangement, with the tallest lantern at the center.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the backs of the lanterns and their consistent geometric design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the staggered heights and the slim profiles of the lanterns.
